mapper.sql: select agent_id, agent_name, agent_type, description, avatar_url, model_name, system_prompt, temperature, max_tokens, status, is_public, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from agent_info
mapper.insert: insert into agent_info ( agent_name, agent_type, description, avatar_url, model_name, system_prompt, temperature, max_tokens, status, is_public, create_by, create_time, remark, del_flag ) values ( #{agentName}, #{agentType}, #{description}, #{avatarUrl}, #{modelName}, #{systemPrompt}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{status}, #{isPublic}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark}, '0' )
mapper.update:
update agent_info set del_flag = '1' where agent_id in
#{agentId}
update agent_info set del_flag = '1' where agent_id = #{agentId}
